summary: Iteration 35 - Strategic APIs: Virtual→Real Conversion Architecture, Payout Guard, IPO Roadmap. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin Dashboard verified with Real vs Virtual tab showing on-chain treasury and virtual metrics with warning.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Strategic APIs fully tested. (1) GET /api/strategic/real-treasury returns on-chain verified balances with type=REAL_TREASURY, assets (NENO: 396.99, BNB: 0.0048, ETH/BTC/USDT/USDC: 0), hot_wallet, block_number, real_revenue (total_fees_earned, real_trade_count). (2) GET /api/strategic/virtual-metrics returns type=VIRTUAL_METRICS with warning 'NON sono denaro reale', total_ledger_volume_eur (7.3M), real_executed_volume_eur (111.78), virtual_demand_volume_eur (7.3M), conversion_rate_pct (1.49%). (3) GET /api/strategic/reconciliation returns real vs virtual comparison with conversion_pipeline. (4) GET /api/strategic/payout-guard/NENO?amount=0.01 returns can_payout=True (396.99 NENO available). (5) GET /api/strategic/payout-guard/ETH?amount=1 returns can_payout=False, blocked=True (0 WETH in hot wallet). (6) GET /api/strategic/payout-guard/EUR?amount=100 returns can_payout=True, method=stripe_sepa (Stripe handles balance check). (7) GET /api/strategic/ipo-roadmap returns 5 phases with capital requirements (total_min: EUR 18.6M, total_recommended: EUR 61.8M), partner_matrix, conversion_model. (8) All strategic endpoints require auth (401 without token). Frontend Admin Dashboard at /admin has 6 tabs: Overview, Real vs Virtual, Treasury & Risk, IPO Structure, Banking Rails, Execution Logs. Real vs Virtual tab shows Treasury REALE (On-Chain Verificato) with EUR 3.97M total and Metriche VIRTUALI with warning that values are NOT real money.

backend_tests_summary.test_07_ipo_roadmap_returns_5_phases: PASSED - 5 phases with capital, partners, KPIs, risks
backend_tests_summary.test_08_strategic_apis_require_auth: PASSED - All 5 endpoints return 401 without auth
backend_tests_summary.test_09_withdraw_real_eth_blocked_by_pay: PASSED - ETH withdrawal blocked by payout guard
